gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing a bulletin board or painting a fresh sign with the day's news. A cute robot helper handing her papers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot pinning fresh news papers to a wooden bulletin board in a digital garden. A cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head hands her a paper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
